name: cpp-code-checker
description: Automatically detect and fix C++ code issues based on MR ruleset

commands.title: C++ Checker: Fix All Auto-fixable Issues in Current File
C++ Checker: Fix All Auto-fixable Issues in Workspace

cppChecker.autoScanWorkspaceOnActivate.description: Automatically scan the whole workspace when the extension activates

cppChecker.autoScanWorkspaceOnSave.description: Re-scan the whole workspace after saving a C/C++ file

cppChecker.maxHeaderLines.description: Max lines allowed in a header file

cppChecker.maxSourceLines.description: Max lines allowed in a source file

cppChecker.maxFunctionLines.description: Max lines allowed in a single function

cppChecker.maxNestingDepth.description: Max nesting depth allowed in a function

cppChecker.maxCyclomaticComplexity.description: Max cyclomatic complexity allowed per function

cppChecker.maxFilesPerDirectory.description: Max number of files allowed in a single directory

cppChecker.licenseHeader.default: // Copyright (c) Huawei Technologies Co., Ltd. All rights reserved.
cppChecker.licenseHeader.description: Required license header text (first line of file)
